summary: Decent source with minor pitch issues; no musical details available
review: Both reviewers agree the recording is the best available source despite a slight pitch problem – one notes it’s a quarter‑tone sharp, the other says it’s within normal tolerance. No comments are made about the band’s playing or specific songs, and the recording type isn’t identified.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two brief reviews focused on pitch; one is negative (2★) and the other mildly positive (3★). Recording is usable but has noticeable pitch deviation, with no performance information to boost rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Pitch is slightly sharp (about a quarter‑tone up), which reviewers note as the main flaw; otherwise considered the best available source despite lack of soundboard material.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No remarks on set structure or performance quality were provided.
